tweets.text:
Confirming my initial buys and gut instinct, PONS and WIRE have solidified as my two biggest and most convicted infra plays on RH chain.

We don’t need a million launchpads, and we don’t need externals coming to vamp liquidity from the dying blue chain or the bonk crew. These two projects have devs that are crypto native, where on RH day0, understand the trenches, are super aligned, pish value accrual to their token and experiment with possibilities. 

And more importantly, they ship like motherfuckers who never sleep. The wite dev in particular legit just schizo ships every couple of hours, has been one the craziest devathons I’ve seen this year 😂Unsurprisingly, they seem to be friends and support and integrate each other’s products and services. With @wirebotRH covering the X angle with native @ponsdotfamily implementation, and even prediction markets soon, they have all they need to just create a moat and run with it.

As usual not fa and dyor, but my two sats says not to waste precious liquidity on betas and bullshit: it’s still so early on a two weeks old chain on week old projects, it’s best to just bet on the clear winners 🫡

thread_tweets.full_text:
Confirming my initial buys and gut instinct, PONS and WIRE have solidified as my two biggest and most convicted infra plays on RH chain.

We don’t need a million launchpads, and we don’t need externals coming to vamp liquidity from the dying blue chain or the bonk crew. These two projects have devs that are crypto native, where on RH day0, understand the trenches, are super aligned, pish value accrual to their token and experiment with possibilities. 

And more importantly, they ship like motherfuckers who never sleep. The wite dev in particular legit just schizo ships every couple of hours, has been one the craziest devathons I’ve seen this year 😂Unsurprisingly, they seem to be friends and support and integrate each other’s products and services. With @wirebotRH covering the X angle with native @ponsdotfamily implementation, and even prediction markets soon, they have all they need to just create a moat and run with it.

As usual not fa and dyor, but my two sats says not to waste precious liquidity on betas and bullshit: it’s still so early on a two weeks old chain on week old projects, it’s best to just bet on the clear winners 🫡

Worst part about the information age is that I am constantly being fed information that ruins my day. 

Bananas nuke the nutritional value of the smoothie when blended. 

Why live?
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
I don't add bananas to my smoothies.

Why?

Not because bananas are bad (I love bananas). They contain polyphenol oxidase, an enzyme that can break down polyphenols. And studies suggest that when you add banana to a blueberry smoothie, you may absorb fewer of the beneficial https://t.co/7uT7iPRw3j
